name: Atlas Energy Solutions Inc.
business: Atlas Energy Solutions Inc. is a leading proppant producer, logistics, and distributed power solutions provider, primarily serving the Permian Basin of West Texas and New Mexico. The company operates two reportable segments: Sand and Logistics and Power. It sells proppant (frac sand) and logistics services, and provides distributed power solutions using natural gas-powered generators.
sellsTo: companies in the oil and gas industry

exposures.sentence: Atlas Energy Solutions Inc. is a leading proppant producer, logistics, and distributed power solutions provider, primarily serving the Permian Basin of West Texas and New Mexico.
We operate 14 proppant production facilities across the Permian Basin including both large-scale in-basin facilities and smaller distributed mining units.
We operate a differentiated logistics platform that is designed to increase the efficiency, safety and sustainability of the oil and natural gas industry primarily within the Permian Basin.

We are also integrating autonomous driving technologies in certain of our fit-for-purpose trucks, creating the first semi-autonomous oilfield logistics network to increase the automation of the oil and gas proppant supply chain.

Our distributed power solutions include a fleet of more than 1,000 natural gas-powered reciprocating generators, with power generation primarily supporting production and artificial lift operations across major United States resource basins.

catalysts.sentence: Moser Purchase Agreement refer to the Stock Purchase Agreement, dated January 27, 2025 by and among the Company, Wyatt Holdings, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company and an indirectly wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company, and Moser Holdings, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company;
PropFlow Purchase Agreement, dated July 28, 2025, by and among Atlas LLC, BCA HoldCo and certain other signatories;

catalysts.event: Reservation Agreement for 240 MW power generation equipment
catalysts.sentence: On November 2, 2025, Atlas LLC entered into a reservation agreement (the Reservation Agreement) for the manufacture of approximately 240 megawatts of power generation equipment.

catalysts.event: Expected deliveries of power generation equipment
catalysts.sentence: We expect deliveries of the equipment to begin in late-2026.
